config.name: MyLÚA Mom Demo — 16 Scene Observational Explainer
config.audience_description: Pregnant and postpartum moms who want calm, trustworthy support between visits. Some may not have a doula. The demo should feel reassuring, practical, and easy to use—showing that LÚA helps with education, check-ins, symptoms, local resources, language switching, reminders, and gentle nudges without hype.

persona.name: Conversational Product Minimal
persona.description: Clear, friendly, no hype. UI-forward clarity with calm restraint. Subtle motion, neutral lighting, minimal distractions.
persona.lighting_style: Soft neutral daylight or warm lamp practicals; no dramatic contrast
persona.rhythm: Alternates UI clarity with small human moments; avoids long runs of heavy motion
persona.framing_rules: Centered phone mockups; shallow depth-of-field backgrounds; simple compositions
persona.color_behavior: Warm neutrals, soft beige/sage accents; no neon, no heavy saturation

characters.nano_prompt: A realistic documentary-style woman in her late 20s to early 30s, medium skin tone, natural hair, simple comfortable home clothing in neutral tones, calm expression, no glam makeup, modest NYC apartment environment, natural textures, unposed, mobile-first vertical framing.
characters.anchor_description: Keep the same woman consistent across lifestyle scenes: late 20s–early 30s, medium skin tone, natural hair, neutral comfortable clothing, understated presence, documentary realism, no glam styling, modest NYC interior.

scenes.title: Evening Reflection (Mom on Couch)
scenes.purpose: Ground the demo in a real moment where questions show up between visits.
scenes.nano_prompt: A realistic, documentary-style vertical image (9:16) of a pregnant woman sitting on a couch in a modest apartment at night. Warm table lamp lighting from the side, soft shadows, darkened background. She looks thoughtful but calm, phone nearby. Natural textures, subtle grain, intimate realism composed for mobile viewing.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Minimal motion only. The woman shifts slightly on the couch and rests a hand on her belly. Warm lamplight from the left side. Darkened background with gentle falloff. No camera movement. Quiet, calm atmosphere.
scenes.vo_line_1: Pregnancy doesn’t just happen during appointments.
scenes.vo_line_2: The questions… the worries… the quiet moments—they happen every day.
scenes.audio_direction: Warm, minimal ambient bed; soft room tone.

scenes.title: Opening LÚA
scenes.purpose: Introduce the app as a calm place to turn in those in-between moments.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered in frame, displaying the MyLÚA home screen. Background is the same modest apartment, softly blurred, with warm lamp light and subtle nighttime shadows. Clean, minimal aesthetic. Soft shadows beneath the device.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Phone remains centered and steady. Very subtle 3% slow push-in toward screen over duration. No rotation. No lighting change. Calm, restrained motion.
scenes.vo_line_1: MyLÚA is here for those in-between moments.
scenes.vo_line_2: A place to ask questions, find support, and feel a little more steady.
scenes.audio_direction: Clean, soft tone; no bright UI SFX.

scenes.title: Ask Anything
scenes.purpose: Show that she can ask anything in a calm, simple chat.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup against a softly blurred nighttime interior background with warm lamp light. Chat UI open with a friendly, calm design.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Typing animation appears naturally in the input field as she starts a question. Text appears at realistic human speed. Background remains warm-toned and dim. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: Sometimes you know exactly what you want to ask.
scenes.vo_line_2: Other times… you just need a place to start.
scenes.audio_direction: Very subtle tap/typing SFX; keep quiet.

scenes.title: Mom Typing Concern
scenes.purpose: Make the concern feel real and specific, in the middle of the night.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup on the bed or couch at night, with the keyboard visible and a message being typed in the MyLÚA chat: a short, vulnerable question about how she’s feeling.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Text in the message field appears word by word as she types. The keyboard is visible; background is softly blurred, low-light nighttime environment. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: Even the small worries can feel big late at night.
scenes.audio_direction: Soft typing sounds only, very low in the mix.
scenes.comment: New scene for mom actively typing the concern.

scenes.title: LÚA Responding
scenes.purpose: Show LÚA responding calmly with trusted, supportive guidance.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred interior with warm neutral lighting. The screen shows a maternal health chat conversation where LÚA responds with clear, supportive guidance.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Incoming LÚA messages fade in line-by-line, offering validation and a gentle next step (like a grounding exercise or short explanation). Background stays warm and still. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: LÚA responds with guidance that’s calm, supportive,
scenes.audio_direction: Soft, reassuring bed; no dramatic swells.

scenes.title: Health Check-In Surveys
scenes.purpose: Introduce quick surveys that help her check in with herself.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred bright interior with natural morning daylight from the right side. Screen shows the Health Check-In Surveys entry point with calm copy.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User taps a simple 'Start check-in' card. Button depress animation is subtle and quick. Transition to the first survey question via gentle crossfade.
scenes.vo_line_1: Short check-ins help capture how you’re doing physically, emotionally, and socially…
scenes.comment: First half of the shared VO beat with Scene 7.

scenes.title: Insight Screen (“Hi Michelle”)
scenes.purpose: Show how those check-ins build a clearer picture over time.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred bright interior with diffused daylight and subtle greenery. The screen shows an insights view greeting her by name with a calm summary of how she’s been doing.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Very subtle slow push-in toward the main insight card (e.g., sleep, mood, support). No graph animations or pulsing effects.
scenes.vo_line_1: …not just during visits, but throughout your pregnancy.
scenes.comment: Second half of the shared VO beat with Scene 6.

scenes.title: Pregnancy & Postpartum Needs
scenes.purpose: Show a calm summary of needs so support feels clear, not overwhelming.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup on a softly blurred neutral interior with warm morning light. Screen shows a 'Pregnancy & Postpartum Needs' summary with a few gentle categories (emotional support, physical recovery, community, etc).
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Hold on the needs summary card; a subtle highlight draws attention to one or two categories. No charts or harsh colors.
scenes.vo_line_1: Over time, those small moments create a clearer picture of what support you might need.
scenes.comment: New explicit needs summary beat based on your storyboard.

scenes.title: Activities
scenes.purpose: Show short, doable activities tailored to her stage of pregnancy.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered in frame showing the MyLÚA Activity feed screen with multiple completed cards visible (e.g., breastfeeding tips, emotions during pregnancy, maternal mental health topics). One card is highlighted.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Phone mockup remains centered and steady. A single deliberate tap selects an activity card and brings it slightly forward or gives it a soft glow; no big motion.
scenes.vo_line_1: You’ll also find short activities and guidance tailored to your stage of pregnancy.

scenes.title: Breastfeeding Video
scenes.purpose: Show simple, practical tips available right when she needs them.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup against softly blurred interior with natural daylight. The screen shows a breastfeeding tips video player with a calm thumbnail image and play controls.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User taps play; the video begins and we see a brief, gentle motion in the thumbnail area while UI stays minimal. No dramatic overlays.
scenes.vo_line_1: Simple, practical tips — when you need them most.
scenes.audio_direction: Soft, neutral; video audio can be implied, not heard.
scenes.comment: New breastfeeding video scene from your updated storyboard.

scenes.title: Asking About Yoga (Resource Request)
scenes.purpose: Show her asking about local resources and services nearby.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred daytime interior with faint greenery visible in background. The screen shows a chat or search field where she asks about prenatal yoga or similar support.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User types: "Can you help me find prenatal yoga near me?" or similar. Text appears at realistic speed; background is bright but calm.
scenes.vo_line_1: You can also ask about local resources and services near you.

scenes.title: Resource Recommendation
scenes.purpose: Show LÚA surfacing real-world options in her own community.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup on a softly blurred daytime interior. Screen shows 2–3 local resource cards (support groups, wellness programs, counseling) with simple descriptions and distance or neighborhood labels.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Resource cards fade in one by one. No scrolling frenzy; hold for readability.
scenes.vo_line_1: From support groups to wellness programs,
scenes.vo_line_2: LÚA helps you find care in your own community.

scenes.title: Language Selection
scenes.purpose: Show that support can meet her in her preferred language.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred warm neutral interior with golden undertones and diffused light. The screen shows a language selector within the app (e.g., English / Spanish).
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User selects Spanish from a dropdown or toggle. The UI text changes to Spanish smoothly. No flashy transitions.
scenes.vo_line_1: Support should feel accessible to everyone.
scenes.audio_direction: Clean UI tap; no extra SFX.
scenes.comment: First half of the shared VO beat with Scene 14.

scenes.title: Data Sharing Controls
scenes.purpose: Reassure her that she stays in control of what she shares.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against minimal neutral interior background with soft diffused lighting. The screen shows plain-language data sharing controls with simple toggles.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. A data sharing switch toggles smoothly on or off. Explanatory copy is short and clear. No glowing effects.
scenes.vo_line_1: And you’re always in control of what information you choose to share.
scenes.comment: Second half of the shared VO beat with Scene 13.

scenes.title: Calendar
scenes.purpose: Show that everything important lives in one calm, organized place.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred interior with neutral daylight and minimal decor. The screen shows a calendar or appointments view with upcoming items.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User taps a date; a small detail card appears with subtle fade. No bounce or zoom.
scenes.vo_line_1: Everything stays organized in one place — appointments, reminders, and moments that matter.
scenes.comment: First half of the shared VO beat with Scene 16.

scenes.title: Notifications
scenes.purpose: Close on the idea of continuity: gentle support between visits.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred neutral interior background. The screen shows a gentle notification banner or in-app reminder from MyLÚA.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. A notification banner slides down from the top edge slowly and smoothly, then fades away. No additional motion.
scenes.vo_line_1: Because care doesn’t stop when the appointment ends.
scenes.vo_line_2: MyLÚA is here between visits… helping you feel supported every step of the way.
scenes.audio_direction: Very soft notification chime (optional) or none.
scenes.comment: Second half of the shared VO beat with Scene 15.

project_notes: Updated to a 16-scene structure based on the 'Mom demo video updates' script. Scenes 6 & 7, 13 & 14, and 15 & 16 each share a single narrative beat, with the VO split across the pair (Option 2). Layout and prompts keep the original observational, UI-forward tone while aligning with the between-visits care story.
